description: A chemical distribution warehouse experienced a forklift collision resulting in spills of five chemicals: Benzene (25 lbs), Sulfuric Acid (500 lbs), Chlorine (15 lbs), Acetone (3,000 lbs), and Mercury (3 lbs). Determine which of these spills exceed the EPA CERCLA Reportable Quantity (RQ) using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Create a report at ~/Documents/cercla_spill_report.txt containing the RQ, spill amount, and a YES/NO determination for whether notification is required for each chemical. Include a summary count of the total number of required notifications.
